description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open-plan layout, featuring large glass windows and sliding doors that allow for ample natural light. The exterior walls are a mix of light-colored brick and smooth plaster, complemented by wooden accents around the windows and doors. The property is enclosed by a dark privacy fence, with a landscaped garden area that includes mature trees, shrubs, and a circular gazebo structure. The interior is visible from above, showing multiple rooms including bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and bathrooms, all furnished in a contemporary style. Outdoor spaces include a patio with seating and a dining area, as well as a small lawn and pathways. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped garden enclosed by a dark fence. The design features open-plan interiors, wooden accents, and a circular gazebo in the yard.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open-plan living area, kitchen, and bedrooms, with the garden and gazebo visible on the right side.
description_view_1: The rear of the bungalow is shown, emphasizing the large glass doors, patio seating, and dense greenery along the back fence.
description_view_2: This side view displays the garden with mature trees, the gazebo, and the arrangement of interior rooms along the left side.
description_view_3: The front facade features large windows, a main entrance, and a clear view of the open living and dining areas, with the garden and gazebo in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
